contactDetails.title: Contact Details
contactDetails.description: Contact detail view with tabs, inline editing, portal access, tags, and notes

fields.inboundTicketDestinationHelp: If set, this overrides the client destination for this exact sender contact. Precedence: Contact override -> Client destination -> Provider default.

status.label: Status
status.helper: Set contact status as active or inactive

contactsImportDialog.title: Import Contacts
contactsImportDialog.description: CSV import dialog for contact mapping, preview, validation, and results

errors.emptyCsv: CSV file is empty or invalid

skipInvalid.title: Skip invalid records
skipInvalid.description: Continue import even if some records have validation errors

upload.help: Upload a CSV file with contact data
upload.contactFieldsDescription: phone_number (imports as the default work phone), role, notes, tags
upload.noteDescription: CSV import/export in v1 handles one default phone number per contact. Tags should be comma-separated values.

mapping.title: Map Contact Fields to CSV Columns
mapping.description: Select which CSV column contains the data for each contact field. Fields marked with * are required.
mapping.requiredFieldsNote: * Required fields must be mapped for import to proceed
mapping.largeImportWarning: You are importing {{count}} records. Processing may take a moment.

confirmUpdate.title: Update Existing Contacts
confirmUpdate.message: {{count}} contacts already exist. Do you want to update them with the new data?

validation.selectExactlyOneDefault: Select exactly one default phone number.
validation.customTypesUnique: Custom phone type labels must be unique.

lastTypeUsage.title: Last Phone Type Usage
lastTypeUsage.message: This is the last use of custom phone type "{{label}}". Delete the type definition, or keep it for future use?

contactPortalTab.title: Portal Access
contactPortalTab.description: Client portal access management for a contact, including invitations and role updates
contactPortalTab.information: Invitation emails will be sent from your organization's email system. Replies will go to your client's default location email address.

noAccess.title: No Portal Access
noAccess.description: This contact does not have client portal access yet

portalAdmin.label: Portal Administrator
portalAdmin.helper: When enabled, the user will be created with Client Admin role. When disabled, they'll get Client User role.

history.title: Invitation History
history.description: Recent portal invitations sent to this contact
history.empty: No portal invitations have been sent to this contact yet.

toast.updateStatusPermissionDenied: You do not have permission to update user status
